LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A leaderboard entry representing a player's finished game with core stats.

totalScore.description: Total custom game score earned by the player based on distances and combo bonuses

level.description: The level of the player at the time of submission

createdAt.description: The server-validated timestamp of the submission

User.title: User
User.description: A player profile detailing their credentials, levels, XP pool, historical achievements, and cumulative metrics.

username.description: The custom nickname or explorer name chosen by the user

email.description: The registered email address of the authenticated user

totalScore.description: Total combined score accumulated across all gameplay rounds

highestScore.description: Lifetime best single-round custom game score

longestCombo.description: Best consecutive correct answer combo streak

gamesPlayed.description: Count of completed 10-question world explorer sessions

achievements.description: List of unlocked special accomplishment medal IDs

createdAt.description: The record of database profile creation

lastLogin.description: The timestamp indicating the user's most recent interaction

leaderboard/{entryId}.description: Global leaderboard listings detailing optimal geographic scoring performances

users/{userId}.description: Individual authenticated user data, stats vaults, and achievement collections
